Hey what's going everyone, I wanted to make a quick video explaining how the affiliate link works. So you go to my account and you have this link right here under your dashboard. And this link is your affiliate link, meaning if you post this on your website or you send this out in an email or you post it inside of your group, anyone who creates an account and orders through that page will be attributed to you, meaning it will show up just as though you sold them in person. The advantage to that is obviously if you have a larger list and you want to promote it or something like that, or for whatever reason you want to send someone home and send them the link with the discounts, you could do that. I would recommend you try and complete every transaction in person because everyone says they're going to do something later and then obviously it doesn't. But if this is your only option or you have a bigger following or something like that, then this would be the link that you would choose. You can also wrap it in a bit later, some sort of link shortener, anything like that will still work fine. A special note that we got questions on, which is if a trainer or one of your team wants to get their commission or sub-commission for sending the link out, it's going to be up to the person to select their name from the bottom when it says team member. So that's one of the things we purposely, it would get really, really complex if we have to randomly generate 20 URLs that are going around one for your trainer, it would just get complex. So at the time of this video, the person will just have to select the team member who helped them out, just like they would in person. So I hope that makes sense. Everything is the same from a commission standpoint, all that stuff. But the difference is that the referral page, the actual, actually it's not different, so the similarity is that the referral page prices are actually the same as the distributor page here. So they are not like the public-facing site which has higher prices, they're actually the same prices as are available in your facility. So that is what the affiliate link does and you can use it.
